planned_surfaces.role: planning artifact for the candidate lifecycle ladder, ION movement mapping, scorecard requirements, and promotion gates
next-work packet sequencing the implementation of the candidate operation protocol and lifecycle gates
evidence-index pointer preserving this plan in the sandbox package evolution lane

core_finding: Candidate domains and candidate specialist agents should be operational under containment: useful for classification, proof shaping, route preview, trace display, and diagnostics, but unable to accept state, mutate accepted registries, alter product front doors, or claim production/live authority.
recommended_next_packets: Protocol draft with ACTIVE_PROVISIONAL or CANDIDATE_OPERATIONAL status
Scorecard schema and first scorecards for screen_state_matrix_packet, terminal_proof_receipt_packet, and ui_ux_domain
Route compiler lifecycle awareness that refuses inactive, rejected, or archived candidates
Promotion proposal for one safe candidate after scorecard review

validation.command: manual architecture consistency check against current assistant-work evidence, phase4 product reconciliation matrix, and route compiler boundary
validation.result: candidate-only plan is consistent with non-promotion boundary

non_claims: This receipt does not implement the candidate lifecycle registry.
This receipt does not promote any candidate domain, agent, template, route, or protocol into accepted ION canon.
This receipt does not mutate ION/03_registry.
This receipt does not approve MCP tool-contract expansion.
This receipt does not grant production, live execution, secret, deployment, or external tool authority.
